title: Video by saurabhs.builds
description: These 4 easy steps will 100x your UI UX game!
text: I don't care what people say, but you absolutely can build websites that used to cost $10,000 in four simple steps. Let me show you how. Go to Cloud Code Docs, copy this and run it in your terminal. Go to NPM, Frame Remote, Copy this and run it in your terminal. Go to UI UX Pro Max and install it in Cloud using this command. Go to 21step and install their NCP using this command. So now you can build beautiful websites just like this one in four simple steps. I've also created a Google document with all the steps mentioned in it. If you want it, just comment, cloud, and I will send it straight to your DMs. Also follow for more such reviews.
